title: Return and yield should not be used in the same function
description: Functions should not return a value and yield iterables at the same time.
message: Return and yield should not be used in the same function.
recommendation: Separate the logic into different functions or use a generator context manager.

noncompliant.description: Function has both yield and return statements.

why_is_this_an_issue: Multiple exit points in a function can make the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Refactor the function so that it either returns a value or yields an iterable, but not both.

metadata.title: Return and yield should not be used in the same function
